title: Fix Views Not Rendering in Production
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want views to render correctly in production, so that I can use and demo the application reliably.
description: Views stopped rendering in production, discovered while preparing for a customer demo. Likely caused by a recent deployment that introduced a regression.
acceptance_criteria: All views render correctly in production
ux_changes: Views render correctly again in production.
middleware_changes: Fixed rendering regression from recent production deployment.
comment_summary: Waqar fixed the issue on production.
